systems.name: Session lifecycle
systems.note: Hello/HelloAck handshake, SceneChange + SceneReady, SnapshotBegin/End/Ack, UDP gated until Live.

systems.name: NPC brains
systems.note: Cabin (Mike variants, hiker, host, Nora, cat) deep; Pizzeria + RoadTrip via GenericNpcRegistry.

systems.name: Doors / Holdables
systems.note: CabinDoor + NOTLonely_Door.DoorScript + Holdable replicated across all synced scenes.

systems.name: Story flags
systems.note: Per-scene flag dictionaries (cabinHouse, cabinGame, pizzeria, roadTrip, office, parkingLot).

systems.name: Dialogue mirroring
systems.note: Host dialogue events mirrored; native subtitle UI used when available; client UI suppressed.

systems.name: Camera / FOV
systems.note: Deep Cabin/Pizzeria/RoadTrip; Office/Parking land FOV + dialogue camera at least.

systems.name: Vehicles
systems.note: RoadTrip and Pizzeria passenger seats are in active testing with F12 seatbelt toggles, synthetic rear/truck-bed anchors, and typed vehicle smoothing. Cabin intro seating still needs polish.

systems.name: Traffic
systems.note: Cabin + Pizzeria + RoadTrip traffic pool/active state + AiTransform correction.

systems.name: UI mirror
systems.note: Pizzeria + RoadTrip + Office UI managers mirrored (intro/fade canvases, dialogue cameras, phone state).

systems.name: Avatars
systems.note: Auto → GameModel → AssetBundle → Capsule fallback chain. HOST/CLIENT nametags; render-only AnimController filtered.

systems.name: Diagnostics
systems.note: Per-process session logs, F10 SceneDiscoveryDump, Compare-SceneDiscoveryDump.ps1, Run-CoopSmoke.ps1.

systems.name: Co-op setup UI
systems.note: F11 main-menu panel for mode/host/client/avatar/overlay config (no more editing the .cfg by hand).

systems.name: Cabin Mike sync
systems.note: MikeCabin, MikeFishing, MikePostEating, MikeAfterHiding, MikeCabinCookController all wired through NpcBrainState.

systems.name: Mini-game state
systems.note: Jenga + Ouija controller + planchette + dining-table colliders + initial-position state synced.

systems.name: Cooking props
systems.note: Casserole/oven/plate/fish/cooking-hand props gated by story flags; client visuals suppressed before Eating.

systems.name: Vending machines
systems.note: Shared between Office + Pizzeria. Cameras, triggers, slot/sliding colliders, soda-can state, audio.

systems.name: Generic triggers
systems.note: OnTriggerSub + OnTriggerDisplaySub + OnTrigger + TriggerEventInvoker mirrored across all 4 non-Cabin scenes.

systems.name: Save / load parity
systems.note: Game's ES3 save state not synced across host/client. Sessions assume both start from the same point.

systems.name: Mid-session reconnect
systems.note: Reconnecting enum exists in SessionState; resume-snapshot + replay-missed-flags path not finished.

systems.name: Menu / loading scenes
systems.note: Client menu cursor/input kept usable; nothing actively synced in menu/loading.

systems.name: IL2CPP migration
systems.note: Game ships as Mono. Plugin has a TODO marker for an eventual IL2CPP chainloader swap.
